briefs.title: Developers Who Started Instalment Payments Before 2026 Keep Their Old Payment Rules
briefs.summary: A BC regulation change protects developers who chose to pay TransLink development cost charges (fees charged to fund transit infrastructure) in instalments and made their first payment before January 1, 2026 — those developers continue under the old payment rules, not the new ones.
briefs.action_required: If you paid your first TransLink development cost charge instalment before Jan 1, 2026, confirm with your lawyer that the old payment rules still apply to your project.

key_dates.label: BC Development Cost Charge amended payment rules take effect — TransLink
